name: #267 · 7706248714faf164e58bc219d6dca979013ad5d6 · Karol Wojcik · feat: deterministic content-hash snapshot refs, get-by-ref, snapshot --all, codegen improvements

newTests.name:
Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > refs survive DOM mutations > removing an element does not change remaining refs

Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > refs survive DOM mutations > adding a new element does not change existing refs
Tests for header options affecting output > webkit browser uses :browser-type :webkit in :script format
Tests that codegen only emits requires for namespaces actually used in the body > core is always included even for body-only actions
Tests that codegen only emits requires for namespaces actually used in the body > script format also applies conditional requires
Tests for get-by-ref locator > get-by-ref with snapshot refs > returns empty locator for non-existent ref
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > page/get-by-ref works via SCI qualified require
Integration tests for snapshot > snapshot variations > snapshot --all returns tree and refs
Tests that codegen only emits requires for namespaces actually used in the body > navigate-only recording omits assert, locator, role requires
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > spel/get-by-ref strips @ prefix
Integration tests for capture-snapshot against example.com > refs content > ref keys follow content-hash pattern
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > spel/get-by-ref returns Locator for valid ref
Tests that codegen only emits requires for namespaces actually used in the body > assertText with role includes assert, page, role but not locator
Tests that codegen only emits requires for namespaces actually used in the body > click recording includes locator and page, omits assert and role
Tests for header options affecting output > firefox browser uses :browser-type :firefox in :test format
Tests for header options affecting output > headless:true is the default — no opts map in with-testing-page

Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > same page produces identical refs > two consecutive snapshots produce identical ref keys
Tests for get-by-ref locator > get-by-ref with snapshot refs > locates element by ref ID after snapshot
Tests for get-by-ref locator > get-by-ref with snapshot refs > locates element by @ref ID (strips @ prefix)

Tests that snapshot refs are deterministic and stable across page states.

   Content-hash refs use FNV-1a(role|name|tag) so the same element always
   gets the same ref regardless of what other elements exist on the page. > same page produces identical refs > refs are stable after page reload
Integration tests for snapshot > snapshot variations > snapshot --all on iframe page includes iframe content
